zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens於大約1450年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易斯萊時，他的父親John Ian Mor Maconald26歲，母親Sabina O'Neill29歲。他於大約1480年與Cecilia Savage在愛爾蘭庫迪 安特里姆安特里姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1499年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾波享年50歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens于大约1450年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾易斯萊时，他的父亲John Ian Mor Maconald26岁，母亲Sabina O'Neill29岁。他于大约1480年与Cecilia Savage在爱尔兰庫迪 安特里姆安特里姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1499年在苏格兰阿吉爾波享年50岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDonald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDonald
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Domhnaill ‘son of Domhnall’, a name derived from the Celtic elements domno- ‘world’ + val- ‘might, rule’. Donald is an Anglicized form (via Latin) of this personal name used in Scotland, though the surname is also widespread in Ireland. The name is equivalent to Irish McDonnell and McConnell , and to Manx Cannell .

History: This is the name of the largest and most disparate of the Scottish clans (Clan Donald), associated in particular with the Hebrides and claiming descent from Domhnall mac Raghnaill mac Somhairle, who lived in the late 12th century. From that time until 1493 the head of the clan was known as Lord (or King) of the Isles. The reigns of the Lords of the Isles were always stormy, often in conflict with the kings of Scotland, and peppered with disasters. After a series of defeats in the 1480s, Eoin Mac Dhomhnaill a Ìle (John Macdonald of Islay, Earl of Ross and Lord of the Isles) forfeited his lands, his power, and his title as Lord of the Isles in 1493 to King James IV of Scotland. By then, a branch of the family had settled in the Antrim Glens in Ireland and members moved between the southern Hebrides and Ireland throughout the 16th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Cathanach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (northern): from Gaelic Catanach ‘belonging to (Clan) Chattan’, which claims descent from Gilla Chatain ‘servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Catan’, a personal name meaning ‘little cat’. Compare Catanach .

variants.name: Catanach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfonso, Alfredo, Crucita, Eduardo, Erlinda, Marcos.
Hispanic: unexplained. This surname is found mainly in NM.

en.lifeSummary: When John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens was born about 1450, in Islay, Argyll, Scotland, his father, John Ian Mor Maconald, was 26 and his mother, Sabina O'Neill, was 29. He married Cecilia Savage about 1480, in Antrim, County Antrim, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1499, in Burgh, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.Dunnyveg, Islay, Western Isles, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens est né environ 1450, à Islay, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John Ian Mor Maconald, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Sabina O'Neill, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Savage environ 1480, à Antrim, County Antrim, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1499, à Burgh, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

de.Dunnyveg, Islay, Western Isles, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens um 1450 in Islay, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Ian Mor Maconald 26 und seine Mutter Sabina O'Neill 29. Er hat um 1480 in Antrim, County Antrim, Irland Cecilia Savage geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1499 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Burgh, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

Lui sposato Cecilia Savage circa 1480, nel Antrim, County Antrim, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glensが約1450年にスコットランドアルグイルイスレイで生まれた時，父John Ian Mor Maconaldは26歳，母Sabina O'Neillは29歳であった。約1480年にアイルランドコウントイ アントリムアントリムでCecilia Savageと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1499年にスコットランドアルグイルブルグで50歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunnyveg, Islay, Western Isles, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 Comhairle nan Eilean Siar
ko.lifeSummary: John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens(이)가 대략 1450년 스컷랜드 아그이 이슬레이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Ian Mor Maconald(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Sabina O'Neill(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1480년 아일랜드 카운티 앤트림 앤트림에서 Cecilia Savage(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1499년 스컷랜드 아그이 버그h에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Islay, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John Ian Mor Maconald, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Sabina O'Neill, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Savage aproximadamente 1480, em Antrim, County Antrim, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. ru.Dunnyveg, Islay, Western Isles, Scotland: Comhairle nan Eilean Siar, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cathanach MacDonald of Dunnyveg and the Glens родился около 1450 г. в местности ислеи, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Ian Mor Maconald было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Sabina O'Neill, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Savage около 1480 г. в местности антрим, коунти антрим, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1499 г. в местности бург, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.
